_doc: Recipe matrix config for the model-selection pipeline. Each matrix entry expands to recipes × thresholds × windows cells. Audit gates apply uniformly. params_source_map gives explicit per-recipe HPO results so the trainer uses tuned hyperparameters; ATM_CE_15 falls back to default XGB params.

audit_gates._doc: G1 = statistical edge (t > t_min AND bootstrap CI strictly above 0 AND net-without-top-5-days >= 0). G2 = trade-rate sanity. Both must pass for a cell to PASS.

matrix.description: Phase 1: HPO-tuned option-PnL recipes across two non-overlapping holdout windows
matrix._notes: ATM_CE_15 has no published HPO results on the ML VM; falls back to default XGB params with a logged warning. If/when CE_15 HPO is run, add its path to params_source_map and re-run cells.
